school.name: SMHSS Murickassery
school.fullName: St. Mary's Higher Secondary School, Murickassery

about.title: About Our School
about.description: St. Mary's Higher Secondary School, Murickassery, has been a beacon of academic excellence and holistic development since 1965. Nestled in the serene hills of Idukki, our institution has shaped generations of leaders, thinkers, and changemakers.
about.mission: To provide quality education that nurtures intellectual curiosity, moral values, and social responsibility, empowering students to become compassionate leaders and lifelong learners.
about.vision: To be a premier educational institution that inspires excellence, fosters innovation, and cultivates responsible global citizens rooted in values and tradition.

timeline.title: Foundation
timeline.description: SMHSS was established with a vision to provide quality education in the hills of Murickassery.

timeline.title: Higher Secondary
timeline.description: Upgraded to Higher Secondary School, expanding academic programs and opportunities.

timeline.title: Infrastructure Growth
timeline.description: Major campus expansion with new laboratories, library, and sports facilities.

timeline.title: Digital Transformation
timeline.description: Introduction of smart classrooms and digital learning infrastructure.

timeline.title: Modern Excellence
timeline.description: Achieved state-level recognition for academic excellence and innovative teaching methods.

timeline.title: Future Ready
timeline.description: Launch of AI-integrated learning programs and international collaboration initiatives.

principal.name: Dr. Elizabeth Kurian
principal.title: Principal
principal.message:
Welcome to St. Mary's Higher Secondary School, Murickassery. Our institution stands as a testament to the enduring power of education in transforming lives and communities. For over six decades, we have remained committed to nurturing not just academic excellence, but the complete development of every student who walks through our doors.

At SMHSS, we believe that education extends far beyond textbooks and examinations. We strive to create an environment where curiosity is celebrated, creativity is encouraged, and character is built. Our dedicated faculty members work tirelessly to ensure that each student discovers their unique potential and is equipped with the skills needed to thrive in an ever-changing world.

As we embrace the future with open arms, we remain rooted in the values that have defined us — integrity, compassion, and the relentless pursuit of excellence. I invite you to explore our school and discover why SMHSS Murickassery is more than just a school — it is a community, a family, and a launchpad for dreams.

academics.title: Academic Excellence
academics.subtitle: Comprehensive programs designed to nurture every student's potential

programs.title: Higher Secondary
programs.description: Comprehensive Plus One and Plus Two programs in Science, Commerce, and Humanities streams with experienced faculty and modern teaching methodologies.

programs.title: High School
programs.description: Strong foundation from classes 8-10 with focus on conceptual learning, critical thinking, and holistic development.

programs.title: Laboratories
programs.description: State-of-the-art Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and Computer Science laboratories equipped with modern instruments and technology.

programs.title: Library
programs.description: A vast collection of over 15,000 books, digital resources, journals, and periodicals fostering a culture of reading and research.

programs.title: Smart Classrooms
programs.description: Technology-enhanced learning environments with interactive whiteboards, projectors, and digital content delivery systems.

admissions.title: Admissions
admissions.subtitle: Begin your journey with SMHSS Murickassery

steps.title: Inquiry
steps.description: Visit our campus or contact us online to learn about available programs and admission requirements.

steps.title: Application
steps.description: Submit the completed application form along with required documents and previous academic records.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.description: Students undergo an entrance assessment to evaluate their academic readiness and potential.

steps.title: Interview
steps.description: A personal interaction with the student and parents to understand goals and expectations.

steps.title: Enrollment
steps.description: Upon selection, complete the enrollment process with fee payment and document submission.

faqs.question: What is the admission process?
faqs.answer: The admission process includes submitting an application form, entrance assessment, personal interview, and enrollment upon selection.

faqs.question: What documents are required?
faqs.answer: Previous school leaving certificate, mark sheets, transfer certificate, birth certificate, passport-size photographs, and Aadhaar card copy.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, an entrance assessment is conducted to evaluate the student's academic aptitude and readiness for the program.

faqs.question: What are the school timings?
faqs.answer: School operates from Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM to 3:30 PM. Saturday sessions are held for extracurricular activities.

faqs.question: Does the school provide transportation?
faqs.answer: Yes, school bus services are available covering major routes in and around Murickassery and neighboring areas.

activities.title: Clubs
activities.description: Science Club, Math Club, Literary Club, Eco Club, and more — platforms for students to explore their interests.

activities.title: Sports
activities.description: Football, cricket, basketball, athletics, volleyball and more with professional coaching and inter-school competitions.

activities.title: Arts
activities.description: Music, dance, drama, painting, and creative arts programs nurturing artistic talents.

activities.title: NSS
activities.description: National Service Scheme unit fostering social responsibility through community service and national integration.

activities.title: Scouts & Guides
activities.description: Building character, leadership, and outdoor skills through scouting activities and camps.

activities.title: Community Programs
activities.description: Outreach programs, environmental initiatives, and social awareness campaigns connecting students with society.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
